description:
SUMMER STARTS NOW | EXCLUSIVE DEAL BY BLACKLINE. With The Market Settling & Demand Returning, We're Moving Into Summer Early - Aligned Back To The Blackline Standard. Choose One Of The Following Exclusive Offers Redeemable On Any Of Our Stock Cars. 1. Complimentary PPF (Gloss or Satin) 2. Complimentary 1 Year Insurance Cover (T's & C's Apply) 3. AED 10,000 Auto Loan Down Payment Contribution For More Information Please Reach Out To One Of The Team Today 
 2019 Aston Martin Rapide AMR, 6.0 V12, RWD, 595bhp, 8 Speed Automatic. AED 629,000 or AED 11,951 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 4 Years. 
 - Mileage only 41,107 KMs - Warranty Valid Until 27th February 2027 (Extendable) - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - One of 210 Cars - Carbon Ceramic Brakes - Carbon Fibre Bonnet - Carbon Fibre Hood Air Ducts - 21” Forged Multi-Spoke Wheels - Carbon Fibre Front Splitter - Carbon Fibre Rear Diffuser - Carbon Fibre Interior Trim - Alcantara Interior Trims - Keyless Start - LED Brake Lights - Premium 13 Speaker System - Bluetooth - 8-Way Adjustable Seats - Heated Seats - Cruise Control - Multi-Function Steering Wheel - Reversing Camera
